scene_description: A high-octane cinematic avant-garde fashion portrait featuring a female model with an intense direct gaze, enveloped in complex textures and light distortions.

features.face: ethereal, porcelain skin, high cheekbones, neutral but intense expression
features.hair: dark, sleek, partially obscured by the garment structures
features.makeup: minimalist, dewy, allowing complex light refractions to define the face

subject.position: Centered close-up portrait, framed by a massive, sculptural garment structure.

attire.style: Futuristic Haute Couture, Iris van Herpen inspired 3D structures.

lighting_and_effects.type: Complex studio lighting filtered through crystalline or glass prisms.
lighting_and_effects.primary_effect: Prismatic chromatic aberration (RGB splitting), casting rainbow fringes on every edge.
lighting_and_effects.shadows: Soft, diffused shadows blending into deep charcoal and teal tones.
lighting_and_effects.glitch_effect: Digital slit-scan photography distortion; the subject appears to melt into rhythmic, geometric waves.

environment.background_color: Neutral grey/off-white to emphasize foreground colors.

color_palette.saturation: High contrast between deep shadows and brilliant, glowing spectral highlights.

style.aesthetic: Futuristic Haute Couture, heavily referencing the style of Nick Knight, Dazed Digital, and Vogue editorial photography.
style.quality: Hyper-sharp facial features contrasted with heavily motion-blurred periphery.

camera.aperture: f/2.8 for shallow depth of field.
camera.shutter_speed_effect: Long exposure ghosting and trailing effect on textures.
